text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "TOMG-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Text-Based Open Molecule Generation" by Jiatong Li, Junxian Li, Yunqing Liu, Dongzhan Zhou, and Qing Li is a real and identifiable preprint found on arXiv (arXiv:2412.14642). Although an ICLR 2026 submission with a different title ("Speak-to-Structure") exists with a partially overlapping author list, the cited title and authors correspond to the original, verifiable arXiv record of the paper.

LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.14642
FOUND_TITLE: TOMG-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Text-based Open Molecule Generation
FOUND_AUTHORS: Jiatong Li, Junxian Li, Yunqing Liu, Dongzhan Zhou, Qing Li
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
